_note: Staged queue adds from CANONICAL_AUDIT-YAE-2026-06-24 drift-auto-fix pass. Not written directly to .work-queue.json because .work-queue.lock was held by a concurrent audit-chains-nightly run. Next lock-free drain should merge these.

items.title: CLAUDE.md line 11: name all seven projects
items.detail: Line 11 names five projects (HBH, Chains, Scheduler, Apothecary, Budget); index.html renders seven cards. Add Brackish Rising and Agents. Handler file, so not auto-applied by drift-auto-fix. Recurring since 2026-06-22.

items.title: .work-queue.json atomic-write-with-readback wrapper
items.detail: Single-flight lock guards concurrent writes but not FUSE mid-write truncation, which has eaten the _drain_log in prior weeks. Wrap queue writes in the GDD.html-style readback-verify atomic-write pattern.
